text.heading: XXX UNIVERSITY, NIGERIA
CENTRE FOR DISTANCE LEARNING
text.p: I write on behalf of the Centre for Distance Learning, University, , Nigeria to offer you an appointment as a Part-Time Instructor/Examiner/Co-ordinator in English in the University's Pre-Degree Programme located at the Study Centre, , along Road for the 2007/2008 Session. You will be required to perform your teaching assignment as directed by the Centre for Distance Learning and the Coordinator of the Pre-Degree Programme.

You will be expected to conduct regular tests and assignments during the contact period for the purpose of continuous assessment of the students. You will, in addition, be required to submit questions and marking schemes at the end of each term to the Coordinator of the Programme who will arrange for the vetting and processing of the questions. Please note that the Centre of Distance Learning will demand for your lecture notes two months after the commencement of lectures. The philosophy of the Pre-Degree Programme is that it will be run in a way that strikes in and closures of the parent University campus will not affect academic activities of the programme. Also the programme's academic session is made of two contact periods and each contact period is for 15 weeks.
The following enhanced remunerations will be paid on the different aspects of the assignment as they apply to you:
(i) Honorarium for teaching at N per contact hour (English)
(ii) Honorarium for teaching at N per contact hour (Other subjects)
(iii) Lump-sum for Coordination of any subject - N per contact period
(v) Setting of questions - N /subject (to be pro-rated)
If this offer is acceptable to you, please signify in writing within one-week of receiving this letter your willingness to participate in the programme.
Please find attached a copy of the time-table for the programme.
